---
title: Common workflow in data analysis with AI: details and examples
---

Let us go through the common workflow in more details, with examples and
instructions for each step. This workflow is based on my experience and best
practices in using AI for data analysis, and it can be adapted to different
contexts and tasks.

## Step 1: Set the objective and constraints


## 2. Describe inputs and explain requirements for outputs


3. Verify AI understanding of your tasks, goals and requirements
4. (Optional) Secure the data: Privacy‑First Development Using Metadata, Anonymization, and Simulation
5. Iterative Data Understanding and Assumptions
6. Develop and correct the code
7. Independent verification using an AI "auditor" and manual inspection
8. Documentation
